atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports bilateral elbow pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain onset approximately one year and a half ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the right elbow being more symptomatic

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient states the pain worsens with use

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient provides relief with icing

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any prior sports injuries

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ibuprofen 800mg three times daily for pain management

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is ordering an MRI of both elbows

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will discuss whole blood transfusion as a potential treatment option

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will follow up in two weeks to assess progress

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will explore the whole blood transfusion procedure
